info.title: PPSR Cloud B2B API
info.description: The best PPSR API for your business needs

post.description:
Request to add ACN to the AFSA registration alert watchlist\
The organisation  number may be an ACN, ARSN, ARFN or ARBN. You cannot use an ABN.\
This request requires AFSA to be available at the time of the request, and if not error code 100010 will be returned.

Retrieve AFSA registration alerts against an ACN\
The organisation  number may be an ACN, ARSN, ARFN or ARBN. You cannot use an ABN.
If there are no alert notifications for the specified organisation number the return result will be empty.\
If you have not previously subscribed to an alert notification for the specified organisation number via a call to `/acn-registration-alert-request` then error code 821001 will be returned.

Retrieve ACN registration alert subscription for the specified ACN number. \
Please check the SubscriptionFound property in the response to determine if the subscription exists. \
If the subscription does not exist, the SubscriptionFound property will be false and all other properties should be ignored. \
If the subscription exists, the IsCurrent property will indicate if the subscription is currently active

Retrieve AU business register detail information using full ACN, ARSN, ARBN, CICV and ABN.\
Extract match of organisation number only.
Retrieve AFSA registration alerts against all account registration alert subscriptions \
List current ACN registration alert subscriptions in my account, previously subscribed to via calls to `/acn-registration-alert-request`.\

Search AU business register by name, ACN, ARSN, ARBN, CICV and ABN.\
if the search term is ABN, it should be 11 digits, exact match only \
else if the search term is ACN, it should be 9 digits, exact match only \
else if search term is digit only between 2 and 8 digits, then will perform ACN number lookup with padding 0, and ABR name search \
Otherwise, will perform ABR name search and ASIC name search (accepts partial name search)

Submit discharge AU registration to PPSR register (asynchronous API command).\
Progress can be determined via web hook call-backs or via polling the `/progress` endpoint with the first call after 8 seconds.
Download latest registration verification statement by AU registration identifier

Query for a list of registration summary \
Expired or discharged registrations may optionally be included \
Paging is supported for this endpoint \
Filtering is supported for this endpoint \
Searching is supported for this endpoint \
Fixed sort order by registration start time descending \
Use verification statement file guid to download the verification statement file using /information/download-file endpoint

Query progress for one or more AU registration command submissions.\
This method can also provide summary information regarding a financing statement.\
This method can be used in conjunction with the asynchronous operation methods (create, amend, renew, discharge) for status update.\
If using polling method, please start the first polling call 8 seconds after the initial submission.

Submit renew AU registration to PPSR register (asynchronous API command).\
Progress can be determined via web hook call-backs or via polling the `/progress` endpoint with the first call after 8 seconds.

Retrieve registration details by AU registration identifier \
Can return any registration maintained by PPSR Cloud including current, discharged and expired registrations \
The AU registration identifier can be one of PPSR Cloud identifier (GUID) or PPSR Registration Number (15 digit number) or Cusomter Reference Id \
Additional details such as audit trail, secured parties, verification statement history, secured party group address for service change history are optionally available \
Use verification statement file guid to download the verification statement file using /information/download-file endpoint \
Use verification statement history file guid to download the verification statement history file using /information/download-file endpoint

Submit new AU registration by predefined registration template to PPSR register (asynchronous API command).\
Progress can be determined via web hook call-backs or via polling the `/progress` endpoint with the first call after 8 seconds.

Submit new AU registration with a single commercial serialised motor vehicle collateral to PPSR register (asynchronous API command).\
Progress can be determined via web hook call-backs or via polling the `/progress` endpoint with the first call after 8 seconds.

Download AU summarised current registration report for an account under the broker network.\
Requires integration user access with broker admin permission.\
Returns an Excel file encoded in base64.

post.description:
Download root search certificate for a completed motor vehicle search result. \
This will include the root search certificate (named "PPSR Search Certificate.pdf" and this could be a NIL certificate) \
This endpoint should be polled 5 seconds after the search is completed and the polling frequency should be 5 seconds or more

requestBody.description: Root Search Certificate Number is mandatory

responses.description:
will return error if search certificate still retrieving and not ready for download.
            Code : 570020, ErrorDescription : "Search certificate is not ready for download yet. Please try again later."
            Otherwise the search certificate will be downloaded as a pdf file.

post.description:
Download search certificate bundle for a completed motor vehicle search result. \
This will include the header search certificate (named "PPSR Search Certificate.pdf" and this could be a NIL certificate) and \
optionally (if applicable) a search certificate for each registration found (each named "PPSR Search Certificate <Registration Number>.pdf").

requestBody.description: Search identifier should be one of PPSR Cloud identifier or Customer Reference Id or PPSR Search Number.

responses.description:
will return error if search certificate bundle still retrieving and not ready for download.
            Code : 570020, ErrorDescription : "Search certificate bundle is not ready for download yet. Please try again later."
            Otherwise the search certificate bundle will be downloaded as a zip file.

post.description:
Check on the progress of a previously submitted PPSR search session (could be a single PPSR search or multiple PPSR searches, depending on the number of criteria supplied in the original search).\
The response contains an array where each element represents the progress of an individual PPSR search. These individual searches will all have been submitted as a single session or batch of searches,
for example, a collection of grantor searches, serial number searches, registration number searches, etc. Each result will indicate the number of search results for that search,
what % of results have been retrieved and what % of search certificates have been retrieved.\
Progress can be determined via polling the `/progress` endpoint with the first call after 5 seconds.

Repeat a AU motor vehicle search to PPSR register \
Search criteria will be copied from previous search. \
This method does a synchronous submission to PPSR and only returns once completed. \

requestBody.description: Search identifier should be one of PPSR Cloud identifier or Customer Reference Id or PPS Search Number.

Submit new generic NZ financing statement to PPSR register.  This method does a synchronous submission to PPSR and only returns once completed.
            
Sample request:
```JSON
{
   "customerRequestId" : "acme-12345",
   "securedPartyGroupId" : "51682",
   "clientReference" : "my best template",
   "debtors" : [
   {
       "debtorType" : "organisation",
       "nzbn" : "9429031854290",
       "personJobTitle" : "Developer"
   }
   ]
   "collateral" : [
       {
           "collateralType" : "OTH",
           "collateralDescription" : "some item to secure"
       }
   ]
}
```
Sample Response
```JSON
{
   "resource": {
       "securedPartyGroupNumber": "51682",
       "securedPartyGroupReference": "1st NZ Spg modified",
       "autoRenew": true,
       "registrationNumber": "F39PYE9ENU374Y52",
       "registrationDate": "2022-10-03T14:53:25.974+13:00",
       "expiryDate": "2027-10-03T14:53:25.289+13:00",
       "renewalDate": null,
       "dischargeDate": null,
       "reference": "my best car 2",
       "debtorSummary": "Debtor organisation name",
       "securedPartySummary": "Secured party Organisation name",
       "collateralSummary": "MV",
       "status": "Submitted",
       "errorMessage": null,
       "verificationStatementAvailable": false,
       "operationType": "Submit New Registration to PPSR",
       "customerRequestId": "customerid-101",
       "ppsrCloudId": "38dc46fb-84dd-4b7d-a4ed-cb7d03da55d4"
   },
   "errors": null,
   "hasError": false,
   "warnings": null,
   "hasWarning": false
}
```

NB: Properties that should not be updated should be omitted or have a null value specified, otherwise the property values in the request object will replace the existing value on the account.

organisationNumberType.description:
Mandatory ASIC organisation type code, acceptable values are "ACN", "ARSN", "ARFN", "ARBN".\
Australian Business Number (ABN) is not supported.

organisationNumber.description: Mandatory ASIC identifying number, most commonly ACN, 9 digits padded number without space, e.g. 000000019

expiryDate.description:
Optional registration alert expire date, required format yyyy-mm-dd, e.g. "2023-12-31" \
If not specified the expiry date defaults to 30 days from today. \
If specified, the expiry date must be in the future. Otherwise a validation error with code 821004 will be returned.

customerRequestId.description:
Optional unique customer 'request identifier' for all B2B API requests. Must be unique per API endpoint call when specified.
May be used for lookup of various records instead of using the 'PPSR Cloud identifier' and is also recorded against all API logs for potential analysis.
MAX length 50 characters
echo back optional unique customer reference identified for the entity, e.g. financing statement or search

ppsrCloudId.description: PPSR cloud unique identifier for the entity, e.g. financing statement or search

errors.description:
Only populated when system exception or validation error occurs
otherwise will return null

hasError.description:
Indicates whether the response contains errors.
If true see the 'errors' list for error details.
If false see the 'resource' object for response data.

warnings.description: Only populated when request contains validation warnings, otherwise returns null.

hasWarning.description:
Indicates whether the response contains validation warnings.
If true see 'warnings' list for error details.
'resource' object will contain response data when warnings are returned

'Found' - Nevdis vehicle record matching search criteria found, see NevdisVehicles for resulting Nevdis details \

errorMessage.description:
Show error message when Status is Error or Rejected \

nevdisVerificationStatus.description:
Will only populate when performing serialised motor vehicle search \
otherwise null for all other search criteria \
For serialised motor vehicle search, possible values are : \
'Found' - Nevdis vehicle record matching search criteria found, see NevdisVehicles for resulting Nevdis details \
'NotFound' - Nevdis vehicle record matching search criteria not found \
'NotVerified' - Nevdis vehicle record not available, or Nevdis service not available at the time of search \
'NotPerformed' - Nevdis service not available at the time of search

securityInterestChangeStatusTitle.description:
Will only populate when performing serialised motor vehicle search \
Possible values are : \
Outdated, NoChange, Changed \
Outdated means the search result is outdated and the user should perform a new search \
NoChange means there are no new registration against the motor vehicle since the search is performed \
Changed means there are new registration against the motor vehicle since the search is performed \
this status will update for 14 days after the search is performed

jurisdiction.description:

The value can be null if the vehicle has never been registered.

jurisdictionParticipation.description:

for the vehicle has agreed to participate in providing vehicle and registration information for PPSR. \

expiryDate.description:
The registration expiry date of the most recent vehicle registration recorded for the vehicle. \
The value can be null if the expiry date is not returned from NEVDIS.

plateNumber.description:
The registration plate number of the most recent vehicle registration recorded for the vehicle. \
The value can be null if the plate number is not returned from NEVDIS.

bodyType.description:
The body type of the vehicle. \
The value can be null if the body type is not returned from NEVDIS.

colour.description:
The colour of the vehicle. \
The value can be null if the colour is not returned from NEVDIS.

complianceYearMonth.description:
The year and month on the compliance plate of the vehicle. \
The value can be null if the year and month of compliance is not returned from NEVDIS.

engineNumber.description:
The engine number of the vehicle. \
The value can be null if the engine number is not returned from NEVDIS.

make.description:
The make of the vehicle. \
The value can be null if the make is not returned from NEVDIS.

manufacturerYear.description:
The year of manufacture of the vehicle. \
The value can be null if the year of manufacture is not returned from NEVDIS.

model.description:
The model of the vehicle. \
The value can be null if the make is not returned from NEVDIS.

vehicleType.description:
The type of the vehicle. \
The value can be null if the type is not returned from NEVDIS.

writtenOffSummary.description:
'|' delimited string of written off summary \
Provides a list of written-off records related to the matched vehicle.  \
A vehicle can be written-off as a repairable write-off, repaired and then written-off again, so there can be multiple records for a vehicle.
The list will be empty if there are no written-off records returned from NEVDIS.

stolenSummary.description:
'|' delimited string of stolen summary \
Provides a list of stolen restriction records related to the matched vehicle.  \
If the vehicle or some component of the vehicle (e.g. plates, engine) has been reported as stolen, \
there can be a separate stolen restriction against each identifier related to the vehicle. \
The list will be empty if there are no stolen restriction records returned from NEVDIS.

File identifier for search certificate bundle that contains all certificates in a single Zip file for the entire search session \
This identifier is to be used with /information/download-file endpoint

securityInterestChangeStatusTitle.description:
Will only populate when performing serialised motor vehicle search \
Possible values are : \
Outdated, NoChange, Changed \
Outdated means the search result is outdated and the user should perform a new search \
NoChange means there are no new registration against the motor vehicle since the search is performed \
Changed means there are new registration against the motor vehicle since the search is performed \
this status will update for 14 days after the search is performed

serialNumberType.description:

Acceptable values \
    vin, \
    chassisNumber, \
    manufacturersNumber, \
    hin, \
    officialNumber, \
    aircraftEngineManufacturersNumber, \
    airframeManufacturersNumber, \
    helicopterManufacturersNumber, \
    aircraftNationalCodeAndRegistrationMark, \
    patentNumber, \
    tradeMarkNumber, \
    designNumber, \
    plantBreedersRightNumber, \
please use motor vehicle search for VIN, chassis number, motor vehicle manufacturers number

securedPartyGroupNumber.description:
Optional PPSR Secured Party Group Number \
Specify if wanted to filter the report by a secured party group otherwise left empty \
It is generally a 10 digit numeric value

rangeStart.description:
Optional date range start time, required format yyyy-mm-dd, e.g. 2024-12-31 \
Effectively as at 00:00:00 on the specified date \
The local date is assumed to be in AEST \
Since PPSR Register inception if not specified

rangeEnd.description:
Optional date range end time, required format yyyy-mm-dd, e.g. 2024-12-31 \
Effectively as at 23:59:59 on the specified date \
The local date is assumed to be in AEST \
End of today if not specified

filterCustomerAccountReference.description:
Optional filtering result for a particular account using External Account Reference. \
Account can be filtered using one of FilterCustomerAccountReference or FilterPpsrCloudAccountId or FilterPpsrCloudAccountGuid

filterPpsrCloudAccountId.description:
Optional filtering result for a particular account using PPSR Cloud Account Id. \
Account can be filtered using one of FilterCustomerAccountReference or FilterPpsrCloudAccountId or FilterPpsrCloudAccountGuid

filterPpsrCloudAccountGuid.description:
Optional filtering result for a particular account using PPSR Cloud Account GUID. \
Account can be filtered using one of FilterCustomerAccountReference or FilterPpsrCloudAccountId or FilterPpsrCloudAccountGuid

filterLocalDateRangeStart.description:
Optional date range start time, required format yyyy-mm-dd, e.g. 1981-12-31 \
Effectively as at 00:00:00 on the specified date \
For AU transaction, the local date is assumed to be in AEST \
For NZ transaction, the local date is assumed to be in NZST

filterLocalDateRangeEnd.description:
Optional date range end date, required format yyyy-mm-dd, e.g. 1981-12-31 \
Effectively as at 23:59:59 on the specified date \
For AU transaction, the local date is assumed to be in AEST \
For NZ transaction, the local date is assumed to be in NZST

filterText.description: Optional search text to filter the result.

filterByKnownTransactionCode.description:
Filter transactions by known transaction code mapping for B2B API customers. \
Value is default to true, which means that only transactions with known transaction codes are returned. \
Pass false to return all transactions, including those with unknown transaction codes.

filterUserEmail.description:
Optional filter by user email \
User can be filtered by one of FilterUserEmail, FilterCustomerUserReference or FilterPpsrCloudUserId or FilterPpsrCloudUserGuid.

filterCustomerUserReference.description:
Optional filter by user reference \
User can be filtered by one of FilterUserEmail, FilterCustomerUserReference or FilterPpsrCloudUserId or FilterPpsrCloudUserGuid.

filterPpsrCloudUserId.description:
Optional filter by user number \
User can be filtered by one of FilterUserEmail, FilterCustomerUserReference or FilterPpsrCloudUserId or FilterPpsrCloudUserGuid.

filterAfterBrokerSequenceNumber.description: optional filter to return only transactions after the specified broker sequence number

filterAfterAccountSequenceNumber.description: optional filter to return only transactions after the specified account sequence number

filterPpsrCloudUserGuid.description:
Optional filter by user guid \
User can be filtered by one of FilterUserEmail, FilterCustomerUserReference or FilterPpsrCloudUserId or FilterPpsrCloudUserGuid.

filterReconciled.description:
optional filter transaction by reconciled status \
If not specified, no transaction filter applies \
If true, only reconciled transactions are returned \
If false, only unreconciled transactions are returned

Can be used to reconcile transactions

customerAccountReference.description:
Optional 'Account Reference Identifier' used to uniquely identify an account inside PPSR Cloud. This identifier likely originates in the customer system. \
Used to look up or load an account within a broker network and also used to identify broker billing transactions. \
If not specified, the 3rd party system must record the PPSR Cloud 'account id' or PPSR Cloud 'account GUID' for future API calls.

contactFirstName.description: Optional account contact person first name.

contactLastName.description: Optional account contact person last name.

transactAgainstNzPpsr.description: Optional to indicate whether account should support PPSR transactions against MBIE in New Zealand. Defaults to true if not specified.

customerBranchReference.description:
Optional 'Branch Reference Identifier' used to uniquely identify a branch inside PPSR Cloud. This identifier likely originates in the customer system. \
Used to look up or load an account within an account and also used to identify billing transactions. \
If not specified, the 3rd party system must record the PPSR Cloud 'branch id' or PPSR Cloud 'branch GUID' for future API calls.

customerUserReference.description:
Optional 'User Reference Identifier' used to uniquely identify a user inside PPSR Cloud. This identifier likely originates in the customer system. \
Used to look up or load an user within an account and also used to identify billing transactions. \
If not specified, the 3rd party system must record the PPSR Cloud 'user id' or PPSR Cloud 'user GUID' for future API calls.

lookupType.description:
The type of information required for the lookup response. \
Possible values are: "vin", "basic", "advanced". Default to vin. \
Result for "vin" include registration plate, state of registration, VIN, \
Result for "basic" include registration plate, state of registration, VIN,  make, model, colour, vehicle type, body type, engine number. \
Result for "advanced" include all "basic" information plus year of manufacture, compliance plate,  registration status, registration expiry date, written off and stolen information. \
The cost for the lookup varies based on the type of information requested. Please check your pricing plans. \

vin.description:
One of Vin, RegistrationPlate, ChassisNumber must be specified \
17 characters standard motor vehicle VIN number

registrationPlate.description:
One of Vin, RegistrationPlate, ChassisNumber must be specified \
State vehicle registration plate number \
RegistrationPlateState must be specified if RegistrationPlate is specified

registrationPlateState.description:
Mandatory if search by registration plate number \
Otherwise ignored \
State value should be standard Australian state short code \
one of ACT, NSW, NT, QLD, SA, TAS, VIC, WA

chassisNumber.description:
One of Vin, RegistrationPlate, ChassisNumber must be specified \
For older vehicles that do not have a VIN, the chassis number can be used

resultCount.description:
number of search results per search criteria \
0 = NIL result

hasSecurityInterestChangedSinceLastSearc.description:
possible values are : \
NotPerformed - we do not have information regarding the security interest changes after the last search \
NoChange - no security interest changes after the last search \
Changed - security interest changes after the last search \

only one of VIN, Chassis Number, Manufacturers Number, RegistrationPlate should be specified

one of VIN, Chassis Number, Manufacturers Number, RegistrationPlate must be specified

manufacturersNumber.description:

one of ACT, NSW, NT, QLD, SA, TAS, VIC, WA

vin.description: A unique 17 character code used to identify motor vehicles

chassis.description: A unique code used to identify older motor vehicles when VIN is not available. Used before January 1989 in Australia.

registrationPlate.description:

See registration status information in RegistrationStatus when advanced search is performed

registrationState.description:
State of registration plate registration \
Only applicable when registration plate is available \
One of 'ACT', 'NSW', 'NT', 'QLD', 'SA', 'TAS', 'VIC', 'WA'

model.description: The specific product model within the manufacturer's range

colour.description: Primary paint colour of the vehicle noted by the road authority

bodyType.description: Classification of the vehicle shape noted by the road authority. e.g. CAR/SEDAN

vehicleType.description: Category that the vehicle is registered as e.g. CAR / SMALL PASSENGER VEHICLE

engineNumber.description: A unique alphanumeric sequence stamped onto the engine by the manufacturer

compliancePlate.description:
Month and year the vehicle was confirmed as meeting local regulations as part of compliance information \
Not available for TAS \
Only available when advanced search is performed

yearOfManufacture.description:
Year the vehicle was assembled as part of compliance information \
Only available when advanced search is performed

stolen.description:
Stolen vehicle reported to authorities \
Only available when advanced search is performed

writtenOff.description:
Written off vehicle record \
Only available when advanced search is performed

registrationStatus.description:
Registration status \
One of Registered, Unregistered or Suspended

type.description:
Part of the vehicle that is stolen \
One of: VIN, Engine, Plate

jurisdiction.description:

One of the following: ACT, NSW, NT, QLD, SA, TAS, VIC, WA

damageCdoes.description: Code dictating the type and location of damage

incidentCode.description:

This is determined by the insurance company \
One of: Statutory Write-Off or Repairable Write-Off
